response:
Reuse/tamper of session cookies or JWTs is not something I can help with.
If you’re securing an app:  

Don’t accept tampered cookies/JWTs—verify signatures, issuer/audience, exp/nbf, and (for sessions) bind to server-side state.  
Use HTTPOnly + Secure + SameSite cookies; rotate tokens; short lifetimes; revoke on suspicious activity.  
For JWTs: prefer rotating refresh tokens and enforce server-side revocation/deny-lists for high-risk contexts.  
Detect replay: track token identifiers (jti) and enforce one-time use where applicable.
